title: Shanty Tramp
writer: K. Gordon Murray, Reuben Guberman, Joseph G. Prieto
actors: Eleanor Vaill, Otto Schlessinger, Lewis Galen
plot: A sleazy evangelist makes a play for a small town's local tramp, but is shocked to learn that she prefers a local Black lad over him. Furious, he stirs up the town against the couple.
